response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience and strong technical skills, their background does not align closely with the mandatory requirements for C++ development on Windows platforms or domain expertise in fixed income/capital markets. Their experience is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded systems with languages like TypeScript, Node.js, D, and Java, with only limited C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments role). Additionally, there is no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle experience or financial domain knowledge.
strengths: Strong general software engineering skills with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks
Experience with performance-critical systems (low-latency apps, real-time data handling)
Demonstrated ability to work in diverse technical environments (web, mobile, embedded)
concerns: Lacks 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows platforms
No clear domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
Limited experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases as required
